message:
🐛 Fix broken trackpad scroll: let native events through instead of synthetic re-dispatch

Synthetic WheelEvents have isTrusted=false which xterm.js ignores —
this broke ALL trackpad scrolling including tmux mouse mode. The old
approach (block all, re-dispatch synthetic) fundamentally cannot work.

New approach: only block BAD events (momentum, throttled, font-change)
and let GOOD events pass through as native trusted events. This preserves
xterm.js mouse mode handling for tmux scroll while still preventing
rocket scroll from trackpad momentum.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
